description: Recherche approfondie sur le modele economique

userStories.title: Pricing strategy
userStories.notes: Validated: $899-1,999 range, 85%+ margins, competitor analysis complete (Oura, Whoop, Garmin, Apple)

userStories.title: Modele de revenus
userStories.notes: Validated: Hardware 85% + Subscription 10% + Partnerships 5%, 5-year P&L from $3.2M to $32.6M

userStories.title: Go-to-market strategy
userStories.notes: Validated: D2C-first + Kickstarter, $300K Y1 marketing, CAC $80-100 target, influencer strategy defined

userStories.title: Plan de financement
userStories.description: Definir les besoins et sources de financement
userStories.notes: Validated: $50-100K bootstrap, $250-500K Kickstarter, $500K-1M seed, $2-5M Series A. Target valuations defined.

userStories.title: Projections financieres
userStories.notes: Validated: Break-even at 1,056 units/year (Month 10-12), WC need $225K, 3 scenarios modeled
